'''maguzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readableness|readableness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readableness|readableness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| maguzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mægizhith|mægizhith]] || [[word:mægizhij|mægizhij]] || [[word:mægizhish|mægizhish]] || [[word:mægizhi|mægizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:maguguzhuth|maguguzhuth]] || [[word:maguguzhuj|maguguzhuj]] || [[word:maguguzhush|maguguzhush]] || [[word:maguguzhu|maguguzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:maguzhuth|maguzhuth]] || [[word:maguzhuj|maguzhuj]] || [[word:maguzhush|maguzhush]] || [[word:maguzhu|maguzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:magufzhuth|magufzhuth]] || [[word:magufzhuj|magufzhuj]] || [[word:magufzhush|magufzhush]] || [[word:magufzhuf|magufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maguzhuthu|maguzhuthu]] || [[word:maguzhuju|maguzhuju]] || [[word:maguzhushu|maguzhushu]] || [[word:maguzhuku|maguzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maguzhuth|maguzhuth]] || [[word:maguzhuj|maguzhuj]] || [[word:maguzhush|maguzhush]] || [[word:maguzhu|maguzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maguzhuthul|maguzhuthul]] || [[word:maguzhujul|maguzhujul]] || [[word:maguzhushul|maguzhushul]] || [[word:maguzhukul|maguzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maguzhuthuthu|maguzhuthuthu]] || [[word:maguzhujuju|maguzhujuju]] || [[word:maguzhushushu|maguzhushushu]] || [[word:maguzhuku|maguzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maguzhuthun|maguzhuthun]] || [[word:maguzhujun|maguzhujun]] || [[word:maguzhushun|maguzhushun]] || [[word:maguzhukun|maguzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maguzhuthuoro|maguzhuthuoro]] || [[word:maguzhujuoro|maguzhujuoro]] || [[word:maguzhushuoro|maguzhushuoro]] || [[word:maguzhukuoro|maguzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
